cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are several steps here with partner switches, so I need to track each change step by step. Let me start by writing down the initial pairings to keep track. Initially, the dancers and their partners are: - Alice with Sam - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Jamie - Dave with Ophelia - Eve with Patrick Now, the problem says there are a series of partner switches. Let me go through each step one by one. First switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. So, Bob was with Izzi and Dave was with Ophelia. After switching, Bob would be with Ophelia and Dave would be with Izzi. Let me check that again. When two people switch partners, they keep their own partners and swap with each other. So Bob (originally with Izzi) now takes Dave's partner, which is Ophelia. Dave (originally with Ophelia) takes Bob's partner, which is Izzi. So after first switch: - Alice: Sam - Bob: Ophelia - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Izzi - Eve: Patrick Second switch: Alice and Eve switch partners. Alice was with Sam, Eve was with Patrick. So after switching: - Alice: Patrick -
